name: Intelicare Holdings Limited
summary: Intelicare Holdings Limited engages in the sale of a predictive analytics hardware and software package for use in the aged care and health industries in Australia. The company offers InteliCare Pro, a monitoring system; and InteliLiving that is designed for seniors and people with disability. Intelicare Holdings Limited was founded in 2016 and is based in Leederville, Australia.
